description_long: This is a modern, multi-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist geometric design. The exterior features a combination of white and wood-textured panels, with large windows and glass railings on the upper balconies. The front includes a driveway with a carport, a recessed main entrance, and landscaped elements such as small trees. The rear of the house has expansive terraces and a covered patio area, providing ample outdoor living space. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some vertical strips and others as large, horizontal panes. The overall structure is boxy and modular, emphasizing clean lines and open spaces.
description: A modern, multi-story house with flat roofs, wood and white paneling, large windows, and multiple terraces. Features include a carport, recessed entry, and asymmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the carport, main entrance, and a tree-lined driveway with prominent white and wood paneling.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the stacked balconies, glass railings, and a mix of vertical and horizontal windows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying large terraces, a covered patio, and a more private, enclosed section with minimal windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with additional trees, a long wood-paneled wall, and fewer visible windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with a flat overhang, minimal steps, and a clean, modern door adjacent to a carport
